messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migracao multicloud e modernizacao Google Cloud para OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e nao invente servicos inexistentes.

## Scheduler → OCI Scheduler

### Mapeamento

| GCP | OCI |
|-----|-----|
| Cloud Scheduler | OCI Scheduler |
| Job | Job |

### OCI Scheduler

- Cron-based scheduling
- HTTP, email, notifications
- Functions integration

### Terraform

```hcl
resource "oci_scheduler_job" "job" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  name         = "my-job"
  schedule_details {
    expression = "cron(0 0 * * *)"
  }
  action_details {
    action_type = "INLINE"
    payload    = jsonencode({
      function_id = oci_functions_function.func.id
    })
  }
}
```

### Use Cases

- Batch jobs
- Scheduled backups
- Report generation

### Alternative

- Cron em VM
- OKE CronJobs
